programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: A recount of the Battle of Gettysburg, when for three days in July 1863 men belonging to the Army of the Potomac and the Army of Northern Virginia fought in the Pennsylvania countryside. The battle recorded the single largest number of casualties of the Civil War, with over 40,000 of the 150,000 fighters being killed, and is regarded as a turning point in the conflict.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: A look at comedy shows' critical role in ushering in a new era of openness towards sex, as well as women's rights and gender identity.

programme.title: Man on Wire
programme.desc: Oscar-winning documentary about French street performer Philippe Petit. In 1974 he undertook a daring 45-minute tightrope walk and acrobatic routine on a wire stretched between the two towers of the World Trade Centre. Featuring re-creations of his earlier stunts at Paris's Notre Dame cathedral and Sydney Harbour Bridge.

programme.desc: Documentary exploring the history of the group, featuring contributions from surviving member Barry Gibb as well as archive interviews with his brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Lost Tapes

programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of skateboarding, from its 1970s emergence as a land-based form of surfing in Los Angeles and its subsequent explosion of popularity worldwide, to its current status as a widely-practised extreme sport. Narrated by Sean Penn, with contributions from experts Jay Adams and Tony Alva.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Fla., to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home; Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: After years of hard work, a real estate agent uses the fruits of her labor to purchase an investment property that can be flipped for dual purposes; a new home for her daughter that will one day transition into an excellent rental property.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: After one trip to Lake Tillery, North Carolina, a couple decides to buy a lakefront vacation home there as an easy escape from their busy city lifestyle; they hope to put their own touch on a home where they can entertain family and friends.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple dreams of finding waterfront property with rental potential on Douglas Lake in Tennessee; they are ready to get their hands dirty and make it their own in hopes that they can host friends, family and even renters for extra income.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A first-time homebuyer has moved back to northeast Ohio to be closer to his family; he's searching for an affordable property that he can renovate into his forever lakeside retreat.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team tackle a build for a longtime subcontractor and his growing family; Ashley dreams up the ultimate backyard playground; the guys pull off an ambitious one-day framework assembly.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The guys tackle a cabin owned by one of their beloved subcontractors, Florida Nick; his family cabin is in need of some major upgrades; they are looking for more space on the first level and the guys build two cabin additions.
